extortion.description: [AI generated] Tuxton.com is a family-owned company that specializes in the manufacture and distribution of high-quality dinnerware and ovenware products for the foodservice industry. Tuxton offers a wide range of products including plates, bowls, mugs, saucers, and more. The company's products are known for their durability and elegant design, providing a stylish solution for restaurants, hotels, and catering companies.
